name: Vansh Singhal
track: A: Agent Builders, B: Content & Research
my_twin: If I had a personal digital twin, it would track how I perform in coding and building systems—like where my logic breaks, bugs I repeat, or where I slow down. Similar to how I analyze my cricket performance and improve weaknesses, it would help me refine my problem-solving over time. It would also observe how I stay motivated and lead in team projects, so I can improve both my technical decisions and teamwork.
